spec.name: The Ticket Booth
spec.description: Long lines are standing here, waiting to buy tickets. There are three vendors working furiously. Ticket stubs litter the ground and you can see that the people are getting very impatient. There is a large, open cashbox here. Main entrances to the Coliseum are to the north and west.

north.description: You see hundreds, if not thousands of people.

west.description: You see hundreds, if not thousands of people.

extra_descs.description: It is a shame that the exchange rate for Roman money is so low. What amounts to a fortune in Rome isn't even worth one gold coin. The contents of the box add up to about... well forget it. It isn't worth your time or trouble to carry it around.
